Guardians of the Galaxy: Cosmic Rewind.description: An innovative indoor storytelling roller coaster featuring a reverse launch and 360-degree rotating vehicles, set to a soundtrack of classic hits.

Test Track.description: A high-speed automotive testing attraction where guests design their own concept vehicles and test them on an outdoor track reaching 65 mph.

Journey Into Imagination With Figment.description: A whimsical dark ride through the sensory labs of the Imagination Institute, guided by the playful purple dragon Figment.

Spaceship Earth.description: A slow-moving journey through time inside EPCOT's iconic geosphere, tracing the history of human communication from prehistoric cave drawings to the digital age.

Frozen Ever After.description: A boat ride that sails riders through the kingdom of Arendelle to Elsa's ice palace, featuring popular songs and characters from the Frozen movies.

Remy's Ratatouille Adventure.description: A trackless 3D dark ride where guests are shrunk to the size of a rat, scurrying through Gusteau's bustling Parisian kitchen.

The Seas with Nemo & Friends.description: A gentle Omnimover ride that blends real marine life with projection characters from Finding Nemo as you search for the lost clownfish.

Living with the Land.description: An educational boat tour showcasing modern agricultural technology and experimental crop-growing methods inside EPCOT's active greenhouses.

Gran Fiesta Tour Starring The Three Caba.description: A relaxing boat ride through the Mexico Pavilion where Panchito and Jose Carioca search for Donald Duck across Mexico.

Mission: SPACE.description: A high-intensity NASA-style centrifuge simulator ride that spins to simulate a high-G launch and flight to Mars.

Turtle Talk With Crush.description: An interactive live show where guests have real-time, improvised conversations with Crush the sea turtle from Finding Nemo.

Awesome Planet.description: A stunning 10-minute film showcasing the beauty and diverse ecosystems of Earth, with spectacular in-theater effects.

Canada Far and Wide in Circle-Vision 360.description: A breathtaking 360-degree Circle-Vision film showcasing the majestic landscapes, diverse cities, and vibrant culture of Canada.

Disney and Pixar Short Film Festival.description: A 4D theater experience showcasing three popular Disney and Pixar short films with in-theater sensory effects.

Journey of Water, Inspired by Moana.description: An self-guided outdoor walkthrough trail featuring interactive water elements and play areas themed to Disney's Moana.

Soarin' Across America.description: A breathtaking hang-gliding flight simulator ride soaring over beautiful landmarks across the United States.

Space Mountain.description: A classic space-themed indoor roller coaster that takes riders on a thrilling journey through outer space in near-complete darkness.

Seven Dwarfs Mine Train.description: A family-friendly steel roller coaster that features swinging mine cars and takes riders through the glittering diamond mine of the Seven Dwarfs.

Big Thunder Mountain Railroad.description: A runaway mine train roller coaster that speeds through a haunted gold-mining town, featuring drops, tunnels, and wild turns.

Peter Pan's Flight.description: A charming suspended dark ride that takes guests in flying pirate ships over the moonlit rooftops of London and onward to Never Land.

Pirates of the Caribbean.description: A classic, immersive boat ride through secret caves and Spanish fortresses overrun by rowdy, singing pirates.

Haunted Mansion.description: A slow-moving dark ride through a haunted estate populated by 999 happy haunts, utilizing Doom Buggy vehicles.

Tiana's Bayou Adventure.description: A log flume ride that continues Princess Tiana's story with a musical celebration down the bayou, ending with a thrilling 50-foot drop.

TRON Lightcycle / Run.description: A high-speed, launched motorbike roller coaster where riders board lightcycles and race through the digital world of the Grid.

Tomorrowland Transit Authority PeopleMov.description: A relaxing, elevated 10-minute tour of Tomorrowland utilizing silent linear induction motors, offering behind-the-scenes views of rides.

The Barnstormer.description: A family-friendly steel junior roller coaster themed as a stunt biplane flight through Goofy's farmyard.

Buzz Lightyear’s Space Ranger Spin.description: An interactive dark ride where guests spin their ride vehicles and shoot lasers to defeat the evil Emperor Zurg.

Dumbo the Flying Elephant.description: A classic aerial carousel ride where guests pilot their own flying elephant, controlling its flight altitude with a lever.

\"it's a small world\".description: A legendary, whimsical boat ride featuring hundreds of singing audio-animatronic children from around the world representing world peace.

Jungle Cruise.description: A humorous boat tour down major rivers of Asia, Africa, and South America, guided by a wisecracking skipper who delivers pun-filled commentary.

Mad Tea Party.description: A colorful spinning flat ride themed after Alice in Wonderland, where guests can spin their giant teacups as fast or slow as they want.

The Magic Carpets of Aladdin.description: An aerial carousel ride where guests pilot four-passenger flying carpets around a giant genie lamp, controlling tilt and height.

The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh.description: A cheerful dark ride through the Hundred Acre Wood, featuring scenes of Pooh's search for honey, Heffalumps, and Woozles.

Prince Charming Regal Carrousel.description: A beautiful antique carousel built in 1917, featuring 90 wood-carved jumping horses rotating to classic Disney organ melodies.

Tomorrowland Speedway.description: A classic track-guided car ride where guests of all ages drive gas-powered sports cars along a winding highway.

Astro Orbiter.description: A Tomorrowland classic spinning rocket ride that swings guests high above Tomorrowland around a central planet model.

Main Street Vehicles.description: One-way rides along Main Street, U.S.A. in antique-style vehicles, including horse-drawn streetcars and omnibuses.

Under the Sea - Journey of The Little Me.description: A musical dark ride that carries guests in clam shell vehicles under the sea to experience scenes and songs from the classic Disney film.

Swiss Family Treehouse.description: A walk-through treehouse attraction inspired by the classic movie, offering beautiful views of Magic Kingdom.

Walt Disney's Enchanted Tiki Room.description: A classic musical show featuring audio-animatronic tropical birds, tikis, and flowers singing standard Disney tunes.

Walt Disney's Carousel of Progress.description: A rotating theater show following an American family through the technological advancements of the 20th century.

The Hall of Presidents.description: A patriotic theater show featuring realistic audio-animatronic representations of every United States president.

Country Bear Musical Jamboree.description: A humorous country music stage show performed by a cast of audio-animatronic singing bears.

Monsters, Inc. Laugh Floor.description: An interactive digital comedy show where guests text in jokes and talk in real-time with Monsters, Inc. characters.

Enchanted Tales with Belle.description: An interactive storytelling experience where guests help play parts in retelling the story of Beauty and the Beast.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 3D concert movie featuring Donald Duck and classic Disney melodies with in-theater sensory effects.

Walt Disney World Railroad - Fantasyland.description: A historic steam train carrying guests on a grand circle tour around Magic Kingdom, stopping at Fantasyland.

Walt Disney World Railroad - Main Street.description: A historic steam train carrying guests on a grand circle tour around Magic Kingdom, stopping at Main Street U.S.A.

A Pirate's Adventure ~ Treasures of the.description: An interactive, self-paced scavenger hunt in Adventureland where guests use treasure maps and magic talismans to help Captain Jack Sparrow defeat Captain Barbossa.

Casey Jr. Splash 'N' Soak Station.description: A whimsical, water play area in Fantasyland where guests can cool off among circus trains, monkeys, elephants, and giraffes shooting refreshing water mist.

The Twilight Zone™ Tower of Terror.description: A highly immersive drop-tower attraction themed around the classic television show, where riders plunge down a haunted 1930s hotel elevator shaft.
The Twilight Zone™ Tower of Terror.manufacturer: Otis Elevator Company / Walt Disney Imagineering

Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run.description: An interactive motion simulator attraction that lets riders step into the cockpit of the Millennium Falcon to pilot, shoot, or engineer a smuggling mission.

Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance.description: A groundbreaking, multi-platform dark ride that puts riders in the middle of a battle between the Resistance and the First Order.

Slinky Dog Dash.description: A family friendly steel launch roller coaster styled as Toy Story's Slinky Dog, curving and dropping through Andy's backyard.

Toy Story Mania!.description: An interactive 3D ride where guests board carnival-themed vehicles and play classic midway games alongside Toy Story characters.

Mickey & Minnie's Runaway Railway.description: A trackless dark ride featuring state-of-the-art projection mapping that pulls guests inside a whimsical cartoon world starring Mickey and Minnie.

Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Starring Aerosmi.description: A high-speed indoor launch roller coaster featuring multiple inversions set to a rock soundtrack by Aerosmith.

Alien Swirling Saucers.description: A spinning whip-style ride themed around Toy Story's green aliens, whipping rocket-gondolas around a figure-eight track.

Star Tours – The Adventures Continue.description: A motion-simulator 3D spaceflight ride that takes guests on randomized journeys through various Star Wars planets.

For the First Time in Forever: A Frozen.description: A hilarious retelling of Disney's Frozen hosted by the Royal Historians of Arendelle, featuring audience sing-alongs.

Indiana Jones™ Epic Stunt Spectacular!.description: A thrilling live stunt show demonstrating how classic action sequences from Indiana Jones are filmed.

Beauty and the Beast – Live on Stage.description: A Broadway-style live stage show summarizing the romantic story and musical scores of Beauty and the Beast.

The Little Mermaid – A Musical Adventure.description: A newly reimagined theatrical live-actor and puppet musical production based on the classic Disney animated film.

Rock ‘n’ Roller Coaster Starring The Mup.description: A high-speed indoor launch coaster set to a rock soundtrack by Dr. Teeth and the Electric Mayhem.

Walt Disney Presents.description: A gallery walkthrough highlighting the life of Walt Disney, featuring models, historic artifacts, and a short film.

Disney Jr. Mickey Mouse Clubhouse Live!.description: An indoor live stage show in Animation Courtyard where young children can sing, dance, and play along with Mickey Mouse, Minnie, and other beloved Disney Junior characters.

Avatar Flight of Passage.description: A state-of-the-art 3D flight simulator attraction that allows guests to fly on a native mountain Banshee over the breathtaking landscape of Pandora.

Expedition Everest - Legend of the Forbi.description: A thrilling steel roller coaster that takes riders deep into the Himalayas, where they encounter the legendary Yeti and must escape backwards down the broken tracks.

Kilimanjaro Safaris.description: A guided open-air safari truck tour through the Harambe Wildlife Reserve, featuring live African animals roaming free.

Na'vi River Journey.description: A gentle, visually spectacular bioluminescent boat ride through the rainforests of Pandora in search of the Shaman of Songs.

Dinosaur.description: A turbulent, motion-vehicle dark ride back in time to rescue an Iguanodon dinosaur before an asteroid impact.

Kali River Rapids.description: A thrilling whitewater rafting adventure down the Chakranadi River, featuring drops, geysers, and cascading waterfalls.

TriceraTop Spin.description: An aerial carousel ride where guests pilot four-passenger flying triceratops, controlling height and tilt.

It's Tough to Be a Bug!.description: A 3D film and sensory theater show located inside the Tree of Life, hosted by Flik from A Bug's Life.

Festival of the Lion King.description: A Broadway-caliber stage show featuring singing, dancing, acrobatics, and fire-twirling themed to The Lion King.

Finding Nemo: The Big Blue... and Beyond.description: A spectacular musical stage show featuring giant puppets telling the underwater adventure of Finding Nemo.

Wildlife Express Train.description: A rustic diesel train that carries guests from Africa to Rafiki's Planet Watch and conservation facilities.

Feathered Friends in Flight!.description: An educational live-animal show showcasing the natural behaviors and flight of various exotic bird species.

Gorilla Falls Exploration Trail.description: A lush walking trail showcasing native African animals, including gorillas, hippos, and exotic birds.

Discovery Island Trails.description: A network of quiet walking paths looping around the Tree of Life, showcasing small animal exhibits.

Tree of Life.description: A walkthrough attraction featuring beautiful animal carvings on a giant central tree model.

Zootopia: Better Zoogether!.description: A high-tech interactive stage show featuring live-puppet characters and digital effects from the movie Zootopia.

Radiator Springs Racers.description: A high-speed slot-car attraction that combines a scenic tour of Radiator Springs with a thrilling outdoor race through the desert canyons of Cars Land.

Incredicoaster.description: A high-speed launched steel roller coaster themed after The Incredibles, featuring a loop, enclosed tunnels, and a chase to catch baby Jack-Jack.

Soarin' Over California.description: A thrilling hang-glider simulator that lifts guests into the air, projecting sights, sounds, and scents of California's most beautiful landscapes.

Grizzly River Run.description: A white-water rafting adventure that spins down a roaring California river, culminating in a drop past active geysers.

Guardians of the Galaxy - Mission: BREAK.description: A chaotic, accelerated drop tower ride set to retro pop music, where guests assist Rocket Raccoon in rescuing the Guardians from the Collector's fortress.
Guardians of the Galaxy - Mission: BREAK.manufacturer: Otis Elevator Company / Walt Disney Imagineering

Monsters, Inc. Mike & Sulley to the Resc.description: A charming dark ride that follows Mike and Sulley as they try to return the human toddler Boo safely back to her room in Monstropolis.

Luigi's Rollickin' Roadsters.description: A trackless dancing-car ride where roadsters perform coordinated spins and maneuvers to lively Italian music on a backyard court.

Mater's Junkyard Jamboree.description: A spinning whip-style ride where tractor-drawn carts whip riders around in a figure-eight pattern to square-dancing songs sung by Mater.

The Little Mermaid - Ariel's Undersea Ad.description: A musical Omnimover dark ride that carries guests under the sea to experience scenes and songs from the classic Disney film.

Goofy's Sky School.description: A wild-mouse roller coaster themed as a flying school, featuring sharp, unbanked turns and quick drops.

WEB SLINGERS: A Spider-Man Adventure.description: An interactive 3D ride where guests sling webs from their bare wrists to help Spider-Man capture escaped Spider-Bots running amok.

Toy Story Midway Mania!.description: An interactive 3D dark ride where guests play carnival-style games hosted by Toy Story characters, aiming for high scores.

Silly Symphony Swings.description: A classic chair swing ride set to the soundtrack of Mickey's Band Concert Silly Symphony cartoon, rising and tilting over the lagoon.

Pixar Pal-A-Round - Swinging.description: A giant eccentric Ferris wheel featuring sliding gondolas that swing along tracks as the wheel rotates, offering high-thrill views.

Golden Zephyr.description: A retro-themed spinning rocket ride that swings guests outward in giant silver spaceships over the bay.

Inside Out Emotional Whirlwind.description: A colorful spinning balloon ride themed after Pixar's Inside Out, located in Inside Out Headquarters on Pixar Pier.

Jessie's Critter Carousel.description: A Toy Story themed carousel where guests ride various woodland critters from Woody's Roundup cartoon.

Jumpin' Jellyfish.description: A family friendly parachute drop ride that rises and gently drops guests in colorful jellyfish themed seats.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A spectacular 3D concert movie featuring Donald Duck and classic Disney animated melodies with in-theater effects.

Redwood Creek Challenge Trail.description: An interactive outdoor play area themed to the California wilderness, featuring rope bridges, rock climbing, and slides.

Animation Academy.description: An interactive group workshop where an artist teaches guests how to draw a classic Disney character step-by-step.

Sorcerer's Workshop.description: An interactive walkthrough exhibit exploring the magic of Disney animation, beast's library, and magic mirror.

Turtle Talk with Crush.description: An interactive live show where guests have real-time, improvised conversations with Crush the sea turtle from Finding Nemo.

The Bakery Tour.description: A short walkthrough tour hosted by Boudin Bakery showing how the famous San Francisco sourdough bread is made.

Pixar Pal-A-Round – Non-Swinging.description: A massive Ferris wheel on Pixar Pier that offers stationary, non-swinging gondolas with spectacular views of the park.

Mako®.description: A high-speed steel hyper coaster known for its deep drops, continuous airtime, and smooth maneuvers, themed after the ocean's fastest shark.

Kraken®.description: A high-speed, floorless steel roller coaster named after the legendary deep-sea monster, featuring seven intense inversions and subterranean loops.

Ice Breaker.description: A multi-directional launch coaster featuring four launches, a beyond-vertical spike drop, and continuous airtime elements.

Pipeline: The Surf Coaster.description: A first-of-its-kind standing launch coaster featuring dynamic surfing seats that bounce up and down to simulate riding waves.

Infinity Falls®.description: A wild river rapids ride through a lush jungle canopy, featuring a record breaking 40 foot drop chute.

Journey to Atlantis.description: A hybrid water coaster and dark ride that tells the myth of Atlantis, culminating in a steep 60-foot drop.

Super Grover's Box Car Derby.description: A family friendly junior steel roller coaster themed around Grover from Sesame Street.

Manta.description: A thrilling flying roller coaster that simulates the smooth gliding motion of a manta ray, featuring four inversions.

Penguin Trek.description: A family friendly steel launch coaster themed to an Antarctic expedition, featuring indoor and outdoor segments.

Sky Tower.description: A rotating 400-foot tall observation gyro tower offering panoramic views of SeaWorld and the surrounding Orlando area.

Flamingo Paddle Boats.description: A relaxing guest-powered paddle boat ride across the park's scenic central lake in giant flamingo-shaped boats.

Abby's Flower Tower.description: A colorful spinning flat ride that lifts guests in flower baskets high above Sesame Street Land.

Cookie Drop.description: A family drop tower ride that bounces guests up and down in a cookie jar themed vehicle.

Elmo's Choo Choo Train.description: A charming children's track train ride that takes riders on a scenic tour through Elmo's favorite places.

Slimey's Slider.description: A spinning rockin' tug style ride themed around Slimey the Worm, rocking back and forth on a U-shaped track.

Sunny Day Carousel.description: A classic, beautifully decorated carousel featuring colorful, whimsical fantasy horses in Sesame Street Land.

Iron Gwazi.description: A record-breaking hybrid wood-and-steel roller coaster featuring a 91-degree, beyond-vertical drop, multiple inversions, and intense airtime elements.

SheiKra.description: A massive floorless steel dive coaster that takes riders up 200 feet, holds them over a 90-degree cliffhanger drop, and releases them into a vertical plunge.

Cheetah Hunt.description: A triple-launch steel roller coaster that mimics the speed and agility of a cheetah, racing across the Serengeti plains of the park.

Montu.description: A massive steel inverted roller coaster featuring seven intense inversions and unique underground trenches.

Kumba.description: A classic high-speed steel roller coaster featuring a 114-foot loop, dive loops, and interlocking corkscrews.

Cobra's Curse.description: A family spin coaster featuring an elevator lift, face-to-face transitions, and free spinning vehicles.

Tigris.description: A triple launch steel coaster featuring a 150-foot skyward launch and a slow heartline roll inversion.

Congo River Rapids.description: A wild river rapids ride featuring water geysers, cave tunnels, and cascading waterfalls.

Air Grover.description: A Sesame Street junior steel coaster designed for children and families.

Falcon's Fury.description: A record-breaking drop tower that plunges riders 335 feet straight down, tilting them 90 degrees face-first before release.

Phoenix Rising.description: A suspended family coaster that sweeps riders along a steel track with tight turns and speed bursts over Pantopia.

Serengeti Flyer.description: A giant screaming swing ride that catapults riders back and forth, reaching a maximum height of 135 feet.

Grand Caravan Carousel.description: A beautiful, classic double-decker carousel featuring wood-carved horses, camels, and chariots.

Ubanga-Banga Bumper Cars.description: A classic bumper car attraction where guests drive and bump into other drivers on a large indoor floor.

Skyride (Egypt Station).description: A relaxing cable car ride that carries guests high above the park, traveling between the Egypt and Jungala stations.

Skyride (Jungala Station).description: A relaxing cable car ride that carries guests high above the park, traveling between the Jungala and Egypt stations.

Serengeti Express (Nairobi Station).description: A classic steam train that takes guests on a scenic, narrated loop around the Serengeti Plain to observe free-roaming wildlife.

Serengeti Express (Stanleyville Station).description: A classic steam train that takes guests on a scenic, narrated loop around the Serengeti Plain to observe free-roaming wildlife.

Big Bird's Whirly Birdie.description: A playful children's aerial carousel ride where kids fly in colorful nests themed around Big Bird.

Elmo's Safari Go-Round.description: A miniature carousel themed around Elmo and animal friends, sized perfectly for younger children.

Snuffy's Elephant Romp.description: An aerial carousel ride where children fly in elephant-shaped vehicles themed after Mr. Snuffleupagus.

The Count's Zambezi Rally.description: A children's track car ride featuring cute safari jeeps rotating on a small track hosted by The Count.

Zoe-Patra's Hippos of the Nile.description: A gentle children's boat ride featuring friendly hippo-shaped boats cruising along a quiet canal.

Gwazi Gliders.description: A hang-glider themed aerial carousel ride for younger children, swinging them gently around in double seats.

El Toro.description: A legendary wooden roller coaster featuring a steep 76-degree drop and extreme airtime hills.

Nitro.description: A massive steel hyper coaster featuring a 215-foot drop and speeds reaching up to 80 mph.

Medusa.description: The world's first floorless steel roller coaster featuring seven inversions, formerly themed as Bizarro.

SUPERMAN™: Ultimate Flight.description: A steel flying roller coaster that tilts riders face-down to simulate the sensation of flight, featuring a pretzel loop.

THE JOKER™.description: A 4D free-fly coaster that flips riders upside-down independently of the track orientation.

Runaway Mine Train.description: A classic family steel mine train roller coaster winding over a lake, featuring drops and helixes.

Jersey Devil Coaster.description: A towering steel single-rail coaster featuring a 130-foot drop and multiple inversions.

BATMAN™ The Ride.description: A classic steel inverted coaster that takes riders through five intense inversions along a Gotham City themed track.

Skull Mountain.description: An indoor family steel roller coaster themed around a skull fortress, featuring quick drops and turns in the dark.

Saw Mill Log Flume.description: A classic water log flume ride winding through the woods, culminating in a steep splashdown drop.

SkyScreamer.description: A 242-foot-tall tower swing ride that spins riders in open-air double swings at speeds up to 40 mph.

Houdini’s Great Escape.description: A highly unique Madhouse illusion attraction where the entire room rotates around riders to create the feeling of flipping.

Lil' Devil Coaster.description: A family friendly kiddie coaster designed for young children and families.

HARLEY QUINN™ Crazy Train.description: A fun, family-friendly steel junior roller coaster themed to Harley Quinn, twisting through the park's movie district.

Roaring Rapids.description: A soaking whitewater rafting adventure that sends guests rafting down a wild, turbulent artificial river.

JUSTICE LEAGUE™: Battle for METROPOLIS.description: An interactive 4D dark ride where guests shoot laser blasters to help the Justice League defeat Lex Luthor.

THE DARK KNIGHT™ Coaster.description: An indoor steel wild mouse coaster that takes riders on a dark, thrilling escape through Gotham City's subway system.

THE FLASH™: Vertical Velocity.description: A high-speed steel shuttle coaster launching riders forward and backward through multiple inversions and drops.

Wile E. Coyote Canyon Blaster.description: A steel junior roller coaster themed to Wile E. Coyote, featuring gentle drops and helixes perfect for kids.

WONDER WOMAN™ Lasso of Truth.description: A massive giant discovery pendulum ride that swings riders 172 feet in the air at speeds up to 75 mph.

Giant Wheel.description: A massive historic Ferris wheel offering beautiful, scenic views of the entire theme park and surrounding forest.

Buccaneer.description: A classic swinging pirate ship ride that tilts riders back and forth, reaching heights up to 60 feet.

Carousel.description: A beautifully crafted, traditional carousel featuring colorful jumping horses and classic organ music.

Enchanted Teacups.description: A classic spinning flat ride where guests spin their colorful teacups around a giant teapot.

Fender Benders.description: A classic bumper car arena where drivers bump, spin, and steer their way around a large indoor floor.

Jolly Roger.description: A fast-paced caterpillar-style circular ride that moves riders up and down over a series of humps and valleys.

Scrambler.description: A classic flat ride that spins riders in multiple directions, creating thrilling centrifugal forces.

Tango.description: A colorful family ride featuring spinning balloon baskets that rise and tilt in the air.

Slingshot.description: An extreme high-thrill ride that launches two passengers straight up in a capsule using massive elastic cables.

Air Jumbo.description: A children's aerial carousel ride where kids pilot elephant-shaped vehicles, controlling their flying altitude.

Air Safari.description: A children's balloon-themed aerial carousel ride, swinging guests gently in a circle.

Barnstormer.description: A spinning family plane ride themed to a barnstorming stunt flight.

Bugaboo.description: A children's caterpillar ride that moves in a circle over small waves.

Bugs Bunny Camp Carousel.description: A classic children's carousel featuring characters from Looney Tunes.

Bugs Bunny Ranger Pilots.description: A kids aerial carousel ride featuring miniature plane vehicles.

Daffy Duck Hot Air Balloons.description: A children's flat ride featuring spinning balloon baskets that rise and tilt.

Porky Pig Camp Wagons.description: A children's track ride themed around covered wagons, moving in a circle.

Raja's Rickshaws.description: A children's flat ride featuring spinning carriages themed around Rickshaws.

Sky Zooma.description: A children's drop ride that rises and gently bounces kids up and down.

Storm Chaser.description: A spinning flat ride that whips carriages around a figure-eight track.

Tree Top Hopper.description: A family drop tower that rises and bounces guests in treetop themed seats.

Safari Off-Road Adventure.description: A rugged open-air truck safari tour through a massive wildlife preserve featuring free-roaming animals.

Millennium Force.description: A record-breaking steel giga coaster featuring a massive 300-foot drop at an 80-degree angle.

Steel Vengeance.description: A record-breaking steel-on-wood hybrid coaster featuring a 200-foot drop and four inversions.

Maverick.description: A steel launch coaster featuring two launches, a 95-degree beyond-vertical drop, and high-speed turns.

Valravn.description: A massive steel dive coaster holding riders over a 223-foot 90-degree drop before releasing them.

Raptor.description: A classic steel inverted roller coaster featuring six intense inversions, including a cobra roll.

GateKeeper.description: A steel wing coaster that sends riders twisting through keyhole towers over the park entrance.

Gemini.description: A classic racing wooden-structure steel-track coaster where red and blue trains race side-by-side.

Magnum XL-200.description: The world's first hyper coaster, dropping riders 205 feet and reaching speeds of 72 mph.

Rougarou.description: A floorless steel coaster featuring a 137-foot drop and four inversions, formerly Mantis.

Iron Dragon.description: A classic steel suspended coaster swinging riders in suspended cars over a lagoon.

Blue Streak.description: Cedar Point's oldest operating roller coaster, a classic wooden coaster featuring a series of exciting airtime hills.

Cedar Downs Racing Derby.description: A historic, fast-paced carousel-style racing derby where horses move back and forth to simulate a real horse race.

Cedar Creek Mine Ride.description: A classic runaway mine train coaster constructed on a wooden structure, twisting over land and water.

Corkscrew.description: A classic steel coaster featuring three inversions, including a double corkscrew spanning directly over the midway path.

Power Tower Drop.description: A massive 240-foot drop tower that plunges riders straight down at speeds up to 50 mph.

WindSeeker.description: A 301-foot-tall tower swing ride that spins riders in open-air double seats, offering panoramic views of Lake Erie.

Siren's Curse.description: An intense steel tilt coaster launching riders onto a track that tilts 90 degrees before dropping straight down.

Top Thrill 2.description: A record-breaking triple-launch strata coaster launching riders up a 420-foot tower at 120 mph.

Wild Mouse.description: A family friendly steel wild mouse coaster featuring spinning cars that slide along a layout of sharp turns.

Wilderness Run.description: A classic steel junior coaster featuring gentle dips and curves, perfect as a first coaster for kids.

Woodstock Express.description: A family-friendly steel roller coaster twisting through the Camp Snoopy kids area.

Giant Wheel.description: A massive 136-foot-tall Ferris wheel offering spectacular panoramic views of the park and Lake Erie.

Lake Erie Eagles.description: An interactive family ride where riders steer their flying eagle-shaped tubs using large front sails.

Midway Carousel.description: A historic, hand-carved wooden carousel built in 1912, rotating to classic band organ music.

Sky Ride East.description: A relaxing aerial cable car ride carrying guests over the park's main midway towards the lake.

Sky Ride West.description: A relaxing aerial cable car ride carrying guests back along the park's main midway.

Atomic Scrambler.description: A fast-paced classic flat ride that spins riders in multiple directions on a three-arm rotating wheel.

Calypso.description: A classic spinning ride featuring four rotating cars on a large sloped spinning wheel.

Dodgem.description: A classic bumper car arena where drivers bump and steer their vehicles on a large flat indoor floor.

Matterhorn.description: A fast-spinning bobsled-themed ride that swings riders up and down in swinging cars.

MaXair.description: A massive giant Frisbee ride that swings riders 140 feet in the air at 70 mph while spinning.

Ocean Motion.description: A classic swinging pirate ship themed ride swinging guests up to 60 feet in the air.

Pipe Scream.description: A hybrid coaster and flat ride that spins riders along a giant U-shaped track.

Power Tower Shot.description: A massive 240-foot tower that launches riders straight up into the air at speeds up to 50 mph.

Skyhawk.description: A giant screaming swing ride that catapults riders 125 feet in the air at speeds of 60 mph.

SlingShot.description: An extreme high-thrill ride that launches riders 360 feet into the air in a two-passenger capsule.

Super Himalaya.description: A fast-paced circular ride that carries guests forward and backward over a series of humps and hills.

Thunder Canyon.description: A soaking river rapids ride that sends guests rafting through a wild canyon filled with waterfalls.

Troika.description: A spinning flat ride that lifts three arms of spinning pods up to 25 feet in the air.

Wave Swinger.description: A classic giant chair swing ride that lifts and tilts riders as they rotate in the air.

Charlie Brown’s Wind Up.description: A children's swing ride in Camp Snoopy, rotating riders gently in individual chairs.

PEANUTS™ 500.description: A cute stock-car themed kids ride in Camp Snoopy, spinning vehicles around a central logo.

Linus’ Beetle Bugs.description: A children's spinning flat ride in Camp Snoopy themed as cute little cartoon bugs.

Flying Ace Balloon Race.description: A kids hot-air balloon ride in Camp Snoopy that rotates and lifts balloon baskets in the air.

Camp Bus.description: A children's mini drop-tower style ride themed as a yellow school bus bouncing up and down.

Woodstock's Airmail.description: A miniature kid-sized drop tower in Camp Snoopy that bounces riders up and down.

Woodstock's Whirlybirds.description: A children's aerial carousel ride where kids fly in birdcage-shaped vehicles themed to Woodstock.

Joe Cool’s Dodgem School.description: A kid-sized junior bumper car ride located in Camp Snoopy, designed specifically for toddlers.

Kiddy Kingdom Carousel.description: A classic carousel sized specifically for younger children, located in Kiddy Kingdom.

Kite-Eating Tree.description: A kid-friendly drop tower ride in Planet Snoopy that bounces riders up and down.

Cedar Point and Lake Erie Railroad.description: A scenic 15-minute ride on a historic, coal-fired steam train circling through the park's frontier district.

4 x 4s.description: A children's track car ride featuring miniature trucks driving along a guided path.

Cadillac Cars.description: A classic track car ride where guests of all ages drive replica antique Cadillac cars along a guided track.

Cedar Point and Lake Erie Railroad - Fro.description: A historic coal-fired steam train carrying guests between the Main Midway and Frontier stations.

PEANUTS™ Road Rally.description: A children's track ride in Camp Snoopy, where kids drive cute vintage trucks on a guided course.

Snoopy's Deep Sea Divers.description: A children's submarine-themed flat ride that swings sub-shaped gondolas up and down in a circle.

Snoopy's Express Railroad.description: A children's track train ride that loops kids around a small track in Camp Snoopy.

Balloon Race.description: A children's balloon carousel ride that rotates and lifts balloon-shaped gondolas.

Dune Buggies.description: A children's flat ride featuring miniature dune buggy cars rotating on a small circular track.

Helicopters.description: A children's aerial carousel ride where kids fly in mini helicopters, controlling their altitude with a lever.

Motorcycles.description: A children's flat ride featuring miniature motorcycles rotating in a circle.

Mustangs.description: A children's flat ride featuring replica vintage Mustang cars rotating in a circle.

Police Cars.description: A children's flat ride featuring miniature police cars rotating on a circular track.

Red Baron.description: A children's aerial carousel ride where kids fly in biplanes themed after the Red Baron.

Rock, Spin & Turn.description: A children's flat ride that rotates and spins carriages, creating gentle centrifugal forces.

Roto Whip.description: A classic children's whip ride that rotates cars around a track, whipping them on the turns.

Sky Fighters.description: A children's aerial carousel ride featuring fighter jet cars, sized perfectly for toddlers.

Snoopy's Space Race.description: A children's aerial carousel ride in Planet Snoopy featuring spaceship-shaped vehicles.

Space Age.description: A children's flat ride featuring retro rocketships rotating on a small circular track.

Crosscurrent.description: A multi-slide water slide complex in Cedar Point Shores water park, featuring twists, turns, and drops.

Jurassic World VelociCoaster.description: An intense, high-speed steel launch coaster that sends riders racing through the raptor paddock, featuring two powerful launches and a series of extreme inversions.

Hagrid's Magical Creatures Motorbike Adv.description: A deeply immersive story-coaster that takes riders on a journey through the Forbidden Forest on flying motorbikes, featuring multiple launches and a drop track.
Hagrid's Magical Creatures Motorbike Adv.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Hogsmeade

Harry Potter and the Forbidden Journey™.description: A dark ride that uses robotic arm vehicles to fly riders through iconic scenes from the Harry Potter series, including Hogwarts castle and a Quidditch match.
Harry Potter and the Forbidden Journey™.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Hogsmeade

The Incredible Hulk Coaster®.description: A high-speed, steel launch roller coaster that shoots riders out of a gamma radiation tube and through seven intense inversions.

Jurassic Park River Adventure.description: A scenic boat tour through Jurassic Park that goes awry when dinosaurs escape, forcing a dramatic 85-foot plunge to safety.

The Amazing Adventures of Spider-Man®.description: A high-tech, motion-based 3D dark ride where guests assist Spider-Man in rescuing the Statue of Liberty from the Sinister Syndicate.

Flight of the Hippogriff™.description: A family-friendly junior roller coaster that swoops past Hagrid's hut and allows riders to bow to Buckbeak the Hippogriff.

Doctor Doom's Fearfall®.description: An intense launch drop tower that shoots riders 185 feet up into the air before plunging them back down.

Dudley Do-Right's Ripsaw Falls®.description: A highly humorous log flume ride based on the classic cartoons, concluding with an extra-steep 75-foot drop.

Popeye & Bluto's Bilge-Rat Barges®.description: A wild river rapids ride that guarantees riders will get absolutely soaked as they help Popeye rescue Olive Oyl.

Hogwarts Express™ - Hogsmeade™ Station.description: An immersive train ride that transports guests from Hogsmeade to London's King's Cross Station, featuring interactions with Harry Potter characters outside the cabin window.

Caro-Seuss-el™.description: A whimsical, Seuss-themed carousel ride where guests ride strange creatures from Dr. Seuss stories.

One Fish, Two Fish, Red Fish, Blue Fish™.description: A children's spinning flat ride where guests control the height of their fish to avoid spraying water posts.

Pteranodon Flyers.description: A gentle suspended glider ride that takes riders soaring high above the tree canopy of Camp Jurassic.

Skull Island: Reign of Kong™.description: A dark, intense trackless expedition vehicle ride through a prehistoric island overrun by massive, terrifying creatures.

Storm Force Accelatron®.description: A fast-spinning flat ride where guests spin their pods to help X-Men's Storm defeat Magneto.

The Cat in The Hat™.description: A whimsical spinning dark ride that retells Dr. Seuss's classic story of the chaotic Cat in the Hat.

The High in the Sky Seuss Trolley Train.description: A scenic elevated twin-track trolley train ride offering overhead views of Seuss Landing and its colorful surroundings.

Revenge of the Mummy™.description: A thrilling indoor launched roller coaster and dark ride that plunges riders into complete darkness as they escape the wrath of the evil Imhotep.

Harry Potter and the Escape from Gringot.description: A multi-dimensional roller coaster and 3D dark ride that takes riders deep into the subterranean vaults of Gringotts Wizarding Bank.

Despicable Me Minion Mayhem™.description: A humorous 3D simulator ride that turns guests into minions and sends them through Gru's training facility.

MEN IN BLACK™ Alien Attack!™.description: An interactive shooting dark ride where guests train as Men in Black agents, blasting aliens to score points while riding through New York streets.

Hogwarts Express™ - King's Cross Station.description: An immersive train ride that transports guests from London to Hogsmeade Station, complete with passing through the brick wall at Platform 9¾.

E.T. Adventure™.description: A classic suspended dark ride where guests ride flying bicycles to help E.T. escape and fly to his green home planet.

TRANSFORMERS™ The Ride-3D.description: An action-packed, motion-based 3D dark ride where guests join the Autobots to protect the Allspark from Megatron.

The Simpsons Ride™.description: A humorous motion simulator ride through Krustyland that goes wrong when Sideshow Bob takes control.

Kang & Kodos' Twirl 'n' Hurl.description: A family spinning ride where guests pilot flying saucers and shoot lasers at Springfield citizens.

Race Through New York Starring Jimmy Fal.description: A motion simulator ride that takes guests on a wild race through, over, and under the streets of New York City against Tonight Show host Jimmy Fallon.

Trolls Trollercoaster.description: A family friendly steel junior roller coaster themed after DreamWorks Trolls, featuring a caterpillar-styled train.

Illumination's Villain-Con Minion Blast.description: An interactive moving-walkway shooter attraction where guests test their villainous skills using E-Limonator blasters.

Fast & Furious - Supercharged™.description: A motion-simulator bus ride that plunges guests into a high-speed chase alongside characters from the Fast & Furious franchise.

Hogwarts™ Express - First Train.description: A scenic train ride that carries guests from Diagon Alley to Hogsmeade, featuring video screens simulating a train journey.
Hogwarts™ Express - First Train.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Diagon Alley

Hogwarts™ Express - Last Train.description: A scenic train ride that carries guests from Hogsmeade back to Diagon Alley, featuring video screens simulating a train journey.
Hogwarts™ Express - Last Train.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Diagon Alley

Indiana Jones™ Adventure.description: A high-thrill, turbulent troop transport ride that carries guests through the collapsing chambers of the Temple of the Forbidden Eye.
Indiana Jones™ Adventure.manufacturer: Walt Disney Imagineering / MTS Systems Corporation

Matterhorn Bobsleds.description: The world's first tubular steel roller coaster, sending riders racing around and inside the snowy cavern of a simulated Matterhorn mountain.

Peter Pan's Flight.description: A suspended dark ride that takes guests in flying pirate ships over the moonlit rooftops of London and onward to Never Land.

Mr. Toad's Wild Ride.description: A whimsical dark ride based on Disney's The Adventures of Ichabod and Mr. Toad, taking guests on a chaotic car ride through the English countryside.

Snow White's Enchanted Wish.description: A charming dark ride that takes guests through classic scenes from Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, featuring a newly updated happy ending.

Pinocchio's Daring Journey.description: A classic dark ride following the adventures of Pinocchio as he escapes Stromboli's puppet show and Pleasure Island to become a real boy.

Alice in Wonderland.description: A delightful dark ride where guests travel in colorful caterpillars down the rabbit hole to experience the whimsical world of Wonderland.

\"it's a small world\".description: A legendary, whimsical boat ride featuring hundreds of singing audio-animatronic children from around the globe representing world peace.

Jungle Cruise.description: A humorous boat tour down major rivers of Asia, Africa, and South America, guided by a wisecracking skipper who delivers pun-filled commentary.

Autopia.description: A Tomorrowland classic where guests of all ages steer gas-powered cars along a scenic guided highway track.

Buzz Lightyear Astro Blasters.description: An interactive dark ride where guests shoot laser cannons to defeat Emperor Zurg and earn points as a Space Ranger.

Finding Nemo Submarine Voyage.description: An underwater journey inside submarines, featuring Finding Nemo characters projected onto real underwater sets.

Big Thunder Mountain Railroad.description: A runaway mine train roller coaster that speeds through a haunted gold-mining town, featuring drops, tunnels, and wild turns.

Haunted Mansion.description: A slow-moving dark ride through a haunted manor populated by 999 happy haunts, featuring iconic optical illusions and spooky music.

Pirates of the Caribbean.description: The original immersive boat ride that sails guests through pirate battles, burning towns, and treasure caves, filled with singing swashbucklers.

Space Mountain.description: An indoor, space-themed roller coaster that sends riders flying through the dark stars accompanied by an onboard synchronized soundtrack.

Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance.description: A massive, multi-system attraction that puts guests in the middle of a battle between the Resistance and the First Order, featuring walk-through scenes.

Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run.description: An interactive motion simulator ride where guests step into the cockpit of the Millennium Falcon to fly, defend, or engineer a smuggling mission.

Mickey & Minnie's Runaway Railway.description: A trackless dark ride inside the El CapiTOON Theater that steps guests into a whimsical cartoon world with Mickey, Minnie, and Goofy.

Roger Rabbit's Car Toon Spin.description: A spinning dark ride where guests steer yellow cab vehicles through the chaotic streets of Toontown, escaping the Weasels' dip.

Tiana's Bayou Adventure.description: A musical log flume adventure through the bayou celebrating Mardi Gras with Tiana and friends, culminating in a thrilling 50-foot drop.

The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh.description: A cheerful dark ride through the Hundred Acre Wood, featuring scenes of Pooh's search for honey, Heffalumps, and Woozles.

Dumbo the Flying Elephant.description: A beloved classic aerial carousel ride where guests control the flight altitude of their own flying Dumbo elephant.

King Arthur Carrousel.description: A historic carousel featuring 68 hand-carved, all-white jumping horses, rotating to a calliope organ playing classic Disney songs.

Mad Tea Party.description: A colorful spinning flat ride themed after Alice in Wonderland, where guests can spin their giant teacups as fast or slow as they want.

Storybook Land Canal Boats.description: A gentle outdoor boat ride cruising past meticulously detailed miniature models of settings from classic Disney animated movies.

Chip 'n' Dale's GADGETcoaster.description: A family-friendly junior roller coaster themed around Gadget Hackwrench from Rescue Rangers, featuring quick twists and gentle drops.

Astro Orbitor.description: An outdoor spinning ride at the entrance of Tomorrowland where guests pilot three-passenger rockets revolving around a central tower.

Disneyland Monorail.description: A high-speed monorail transit system that transports guests between Tomorrowland and the Downtown Disney District, offering scenic views.

Adventureland Treehouse inspired by Walt.description: A detailed walkthrough treehouse built in a giant artificial tree, themed to the Swiss Family Robinson.

Davy Crockett's Explorer Canoes.description: An interactive, guest-paddled canoe excursion around the Rivers of America, led by two expert guides.

Casey Jr. Circus Train.description: A classic junior train ride themed after the circus train from Dumbo, carrying guests over scenic miniature hills.

Mark Twain Riverboat.description: A relaxing 14-minute cruise around the Rivers of America aboard a historic, steam-powered paddle wheel riverboat.

Sailing Ship Columbia.description: A scenic cruise around the Rivers of America aboard a full-scale replica of the historic 18th-century merchant vessel.

Disneyland Railroad.description: A classic steam-powered train that takes guests on a scenic, grand circle tour around Disneyland Park.

Main Street Vehicles.description: A collection of vintage, early-20th-century vehicles (omnibus, fire engine, horse-drawn streetcars) offering one-way transit.

Donald's Duck Pond.description: A wet play area for young children located in Mickey's Toontown, featuring water splashes and interactive toys.

Minnie's House.description: A charming walkthrough of Minnie Mouse's cartoon home in Toontown, featuring interactive kitchen appliances.

Star Tours - The Adventures Continue.description: A 3D motion-simulator spaceflight ride that takes guests on randomized journeys through various Star Wars planets.

Walt Disney's Enchanted Tiki Room.description: The original musical show featuring animatronic tropical birds, tikis, and flowers singing island melodies.

Great Moments with Mr. Lincoln.description: A historic theater show featuring a lifelike audio-animatronic figure of Abraham Lincoln delivering famous speeches.

Pirate's Lair on Tom Sawyer Island.description: An interactive island play area featuring pirate caves, rope bridges, and forts accessible by guest-piloted rafts.

Frontierland Shootin' Exposition.description: An interactive arcade where guests shoot electronic rifles at target sensors in a desert setting.

Adventure Tree Carousel.description: A classic, beautifully detailed double-decker carousel featuring hand-carved animals and historic artwork, providing a gentle ride for guests of all ages.

Barrel Bail Out!.description: An interactive water battle ride on Shipwreck Coast where guests spin in themed barrels and use water cannons to soak onlookers and other riders.

Blue Barnacle.description: A classic swinging pirate ship ride on Shipwreck Coast that swings guests high into the air, creating thrilling moments of weightlessness.

Chase's Mountain Mission.description: A junior roller coaster in the World of PAW Patrol where kids join Chase on a fun, high-speed rescue mission down gentle drops and turns.

Croc Drop.description: A high-thrill drop tower ride themed to the ancient crocodile god Sobek, plunging riders 25 meters down into a crocodile's gaping jaws.

Dragon's Fury.description: A thrilling steel spinning coaster featuring rapid twists, vertical drops, and 360-degree spins that vary based on rider weight distribution.

Dragon's Playhouse - Soft Play.description: An indoor soft play area located in Land of the Dragons, featuring climbing nets, slides, and play zones for younger children.

Griffin's Galleon.description: A fun Kontiki-style flat ride that rocks back and forth along a curved track while spinning, located in the Land of the Dragons.

Jungle Rangers.description: A family car track ride where young explorers drive mini safari vehicles through a lush, themed jungle trail in the Rainforest land.

Mamba Strike.description: A spinning, swooping flat ride themed to a striking black mamba, lifting and rotating riders through Jumanji's bazaar.

Mandrill Mayhem.description: A thrilling wing coaster themed to rampaging mandrills, launching riders backwards and forwards around a giant Jaguar shrine.

Marshall's Firetruck Rescue.description: A fun, rotating family ride in the World of PAW Patrol where kids board firetrucks to help Marshall put out imaginary fires.

Ostrich Stampede.description: A bouncing, rotating flat ride where riders sit on ostriches that swerve and bounce to escape Jumanji's wild stampede.

Rattlesnake.description: A classic Wild Mouse wooden-themed steel roller coaster featuring sharp 90-degree unbanked turns and sudden drops.

River Rafts.description: A family water ride where guests board circular rafts and cruise down a gentle river course in the Rainforest land.

Room on the Broom - A Magical Journey.description: An interactive walkthrough attraction based on the beloved children's book, featuring physical sets, projection mapping, and games.

Sea Dragons.description: A friendly junior boat ride in the Land of the Dragons where young guests float in circular dragon-shaped boats.

Seastorm.description: A classic circular rotating flat ride on Shipwreck Coast that spins and simulates a choppy sea voyage in pirate ships.

Skye's Helicopter Heroes.description: A rotating aerial ride in the World of PAW Patrol where kids board helicopters and control their height to fly with Skye.

The Gruffalo River Ride Adventure.description: A magical dark water boat ride through the deep dark wood, featuring animatronics, music, and special effects from the Gruffalo story.

Tiger Rock.description: An exciting log flume water ride that takes guests past real tiger enclosures before dropping down a steep waterfall.

Tiny Truckers.description: A gentle convoy truck ride in Adventure Point where young children can take the wheel and drive vintage semi-trucks.

Tomb Blaster.description: An interactive laser-shooting dark ride where riders shoot light-up targets to defeat the Mummy Elixir in an ancient tomb.

Trawler Trouble.description: A rocking tug boat ride on Shipwreck Coast that spins and slides side-to-side, simulating a rocky sea voyage.

Treetop Hoppers.description: A fun junior drop tower ride in the Land of the Dragons that gently bounces riders up and down in themed carriages.

Vampire.description: A legendary suspended roller coaster that swings riders over the treetops and through subterranean tunnels in Wild Woods.

ZUFARI.description: An off-road safari truck adventure that drives guests through an African reserve populated with rhinos, giraffes, and zebras.

Zuma's Hovercraft Adventure.description: A spinning family water flat ride in the World of PAW Patrol where kids board themed hovercrafts to spin around Zuma.

Constellation Carousel.description: A whimsical double-decker carousel in Celestial Park where riders board astronomical animals that glide up and down while rotating 360 degrees.

Stardust Racers.description: A thrilling dual-launch racing coaster in Celestial Park that sends two trains racing side-by-side along inverted tracks, reaching speeds of 62 mph.

Curse of the Werewolf.description: A thrilling spinning family roller coaster in Dark Universe where riders board wagons to escape a snarling pack of werewolves through the forest.

Monsters Unchained: The Frankenstein Exp.description: A high-intensity dark ride inside Frankenstein Manor where guests try to escape Dracula, the Wolf Man, and other monsters unleashed during an experiment.

Dragon Racer's Rally.description: A pair of thrilling, interactive Sky Fly rides in Isle of Berk where riders control their dragon-shaped vehicles to perform barrel rolls and spins.
Dragon Racer's Rally.land: How to Train Your Dragon - Isle of Berk

Fyre Drill.description: An interactive water battle boat ride in Isle of Berk where guests use water cannons to shoot targets and soak neighboring boats.
Fyre Drill.land: How to Train Your Dragon - Isle of Berk

Hiccup's Wing Gliders.description: A family launched roller coaster in Isle of Berk that swoops and glides over the land and water, simulating a flight on a dragon training glider.
Hiccup's Wing Gliders.land: How to Train Your Dragon - Isle of Berk

Bowser Jr. Challenge.description: An interactive floor-projection mini-game in Super Nintendo World where guests use their bodies and Power-Up Bands to defeat Bowser Jr.

Mario Kart®: Bowser's Challenge.description: An interactive dark ride in Super Nintendo World where riders wear AR goggles to steer, throw shells, and race along a multi-sensory Mario Kart course.

Mine-Cart Madness®.description: A family steel coaster in Super Nintendo World featuring a unique hidden track system that makes the mine carts appear to jump over gaps in the track.

Yoshi's Adventure®.description: A family friendly omnimover track ride in Super Nintendo World that takes guests on a colorful search for Captain Toad and three mysterious eggs.

Harry Potter and the Battle at the Minis.description: A groundbreaking dark ride featuring omnidirectional lifts where guests join Harry, Ron, and Hermione for a high-stakes trial at the British Ministry of Magic.
Harry Potter and the Battle at the Minis.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Ministry of Magic

Despicable Me Minion Mayhem.description: An interactive motion-simulator ride where guests are transformed into Minions and run through Gru's laboratory on a wild, hilarious training mission.

Flight of the Hippogriff™.description: A family-friendly steel roller coaster in Hogsmeade where guests swoop past Hagrid's hut and bow to a Hippogriff before taking flight over the grounds.
Flight of the Hippogriff™.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter

Freeze Ray Sliders.description: A fun spinning flat ride in Minion Park where guests ride in ice-maker vehicles that slide and spin across a giant frozen ice rink.

Harry Potter and the Forbidden Journey™.description: A thrilling multi-sensory dark ride featuring a robotic arm system that flies guests through iconic scenes, battling Dementors and dragons in Hogwarts.
Harry Potter and the Forbidden Journey™.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter

Hello Kitty's Cupcake Dream.description: A colorful spinning teacup-style ride in Universal Wonderland where guests board giant cupcakes and spin them using a center wheel.

Hollywood Dream - The Ride.description: A smooth Bolliger & Mabillard steel hyper coaster that allows riders to select a personal soundtrack to listen to during the high-speed airtime hills.

Hollywood Dream -The Ride - Backdrop-.description: A thrilling variation of the Hollywood Dream coaster where the trains run backward, intensifying the drops and weightlessness of the layout.

JAWS™.description: A classic scenic boat tour through Amity Harbor that goes terribly wrong when a massive, ravenous great white shark repeatedly attacks the boat.

Jurassic Park – The Ride™.description: A thrilling river boat tour through dinosaur habitats that escalates into an escape from a Tyrannosaurus Rex, ending with a massive 25-meter plunge.

Mario Kart: Koopa's Challenge™.description: An interactive dark ride in Super Nintendo World where riders wear AR goggles to steer, throw shells, and race along a multi-sensory Mario Kart course.

Mine Cart Madness™.description: A family steel coaster featuring a unique hidden track system that makes the mine carts appear to jump over gaps in the track.

Ollivanders™.description: An intimate interactive show in Hogsmeade where a wandkeeper helps select a wand for a chosen guest, accompanied by magical special effects.
Ollivanders™.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter

SING ON TOUR.description: An energetic live musical show featuring animatronic characters and live performers singing hit songs from Illumination's SING films.

Sesame Street 4-D Movie Magic™.description: An entertaining 3D film attraction in Hollywood featuring physical 4D sensory effects like wind and water sprays with Sesame Street characters.

Space Fantasy – The Ride.description: A spinning indoor steel roller coaster in Hollywood that takes riders on a starry cosmic voyage to restore energy to the sun.

The Flying Dinosaur.description: An intense, flying steel roller coaster in Jurassic Park where riders are suspended face-down and flown through several loops and twists.

The Flying Snoopy.description: A rotating aerial ride in Universal Wonderland where children board Snoopy-themed vehicles and control their height to fly around a center hub.

Yoshi's Adventure™.description: A family friendly omnimover track ride in Super Nintendo World that takes guests on a colorful search for Captain Toad and three mysterious eggs.

スヌーピーのフライング•エース•アドベンチャー.description: A kid-friendly spinning aerial flat ride in Universal Wonderland where children fly in Snoopy's biplane to complete an aerial adventure.

スペース・ファンタジー・ザ・ライド ～CLUB ZEDD REMIX～.description: A special DJ music-themed spinning indoor roller coaster overlay featuring high-energy beats and dance club lighting effects throughout the layout.

ミニオン・ハチャメチャ・ミッション ～大悪党への道～.description: A fun, interactive family show experience in Minion Park where kids complete mini missions to learn what it takes to become a great supervillain.

呪術廻戦・ザ・リアル 4-D ～廻る時計台～.description: An intense 4D theater film attraction featuring 3D visuals, wind, and water effects, detailing an action-packed sorcerer battle at a clock tower.

Alice's Tea Party.description: A whimsical spinning teacup attraction in Fantasyland where guests can spin their colorful cups as fast or slow as they like.

Beaver Brothers Explorer Canoes.description: A self-paddled canoe experience where guests paddle together on the Rivers of America around Tom Sawyer Island.

Big Thunder Mountain.description: A thrilling runaway mine train roller coaster that races through a gold-mining town, passing red rock canyons and caves.

Castle Carrousel.description: A classic, beautifully decorated carousel in Fantasyland featuring majestic white horses rotating to instrumental Disney music.

Donald's Boat.description: A fun, interactive walkthrough play area shaped like Donald Duck's boat, the Miss Daisy, featuring water fountains and fog horns.

Dumbo The Flying Elephant.description: A classic aerial carousel in Fantasyland where guests can board Dumbo and control their height as they fly in a circle.

Enchanted Tale of Beauty and the Beast.description: A groundbreaking trackless dark ride inside Beast's Castle where guests dance through iconic musical scenes in giant teacups.

Gadget's Go Coaster.description: A fun family junior roller coaster in Toontown designed by Gadget Hackwrench, featuring quick turns and drops over a colorful acorn pond.

Goofy's Paint 'n' Play House.description: An interactive walkthrough experience in Toontown where guests use paint-shooters to redecorate Goofy's room in real-time.

Haunted Mansion.description: A classic gothic dark ride in Fantasyland where guests ride Doom Buggies through a manor inhabited by 999 happy haunts.

Jungle Cruise: Wildlife Expeditions.description: A classic jungle boat cruise featuring humor-filled narration by a skipper, passing animatronic wildlife and ancient ruins.

Mark Twain Riverboat.description: A relaxing scenic cruise aboard a grand four-deck steam paddle wheeler on the Rivers of America in Westernland.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A comical 3D concert film in Fantasyland starring Donald Duck, featuring physical 4D effects and classic Disney musical numbers.

Monsters, Inc. Ride & Go Seek!.description: An interactive dark ride in Tomorrowland where guests use flashlights to find hidden monsters throughout Monstropolis.

Omnibus.description: A double-decker bus that takes guests on a slow, scenic tour around the central plaza in World Bazaar.

Peter Pan's Flight.description: A suspended dark ride in Fantasyland where guests board pirate ships to fly over London and Never Land.

Pinocchio's Daring Journey.description: A classic dark ride in Fantasyland that follows Pinocchio's adventures from Stromboli's puppet show to Pleasure Island.

Pirates of the Caribbean.description: A grand water dark ride in Adventureland where guests cruise past scenes of pirate battles, pillaging, and Jack Sparrow.

Pooh's Hunny Hunt.description: A critically acclaimed trackless dark ride where guests bounce, spin, and dance in honey pots through the Hundred Acre Wood.

Roger Rabbit's Car Toon Spin.description: A spinning dark ride in Toontown where guests board yellow cabs and spin their vehicles while evading the Weasel's dip.

Snow White's Adventures.description: A classic dark ride in Fantasyland focusing on the Evil Queen and the scary forest, providing a spooky atmosphere for younger guests.

Splash Mountain.description: A thrilling log flume ride in Critter Country featuring animatronic forest creatures, ending with a steep 16-meter drop.

Star Tours: The Adventures Continue.description: A motion-simulator space flight in Tomorrowland featuring randomly randomized Star Wars storylines in 3D.

The Enchanted Tiki Room: Stitch Presents.description: A musical audio-animatronic show in Adventureland featuring Hawaiian birds, Tiki gods, and a surprise appearance by Stitch.

The Happy Ride with Baymax.description: A high-energy spinning whip ride in Tomorrowland where guests are pulled in cars by medical companion robots to upbeat pop tracks.

Tom Sawyer Island Rafts.description: A log raft ride that transports guests across the Rivers of America to explore Tom Sawyer Island in Westernland.

Toon Park.description: A soft outdoor playground in Toontown where toddlers and small children can crawl and play on soft sculpture animals.

Western River Railroad.description: A classic steam locomotive ride that takes guests on a scenic journey through Adventureland, Westernland, and a dinosaur cave.

“it’s a small world with Groot”.description: A classic boat ride featuring hundreds of singing dolls, updated in 2025/2026 to incorporate Marvel characters like Groot and Rocket.

20,000 Leagues Under the Sea.description: A suspended dark ride in Mysterious Island where guests board mini-submarines to explore the depths of the ocean.

Anna and Elsa's Frozen Journey.description: A spectacular water dark ride in Fantasy Springs detailing the Frozen story with advanced animatronics, boat drops, and projection effects.

Aquatopia.description: A trackless water ride in Port Discovery where watercraft spin, slide, and navigate a shallow pool via a hidden guiding system.

Big City Vehicles.description: A slow, scenic automobile tour in classic 1920s vehicles around the streets of the American Waterfront.

Blowfish Balloon Race.description: A colorful family flat ride in Triton's Kingdom where guests board blowfish-shaped gondolas and spin around in a circle.

Caravan Carousel.description: A beautiful double-decker carousel in Arabian Coast featuring hand-carved horses, camels, griffins, and Genie from Aladdin.

DisneySea Electric Railway (American Wat.description: A nostalgic elevated trolley railway linking the American Waterfront to Port Discovery, offering scenic park views.

DisneySea Electric Railway (Port Discove.description: A nostalgic elevated trolley railway linking Port Discovery to the American Waterfront, offering scenic park views.

DisneySea Transit Steamer Line (American.description: A relaxing steamer boat tour that cruises through the canals and waterways connecting park lands.

DisneySea Transit Steamer Line (Lost Riv.description: A relaxing steamer boat tour that cruises through the canals and waterways connecting park lands.

DisneySea Transit Steamer Line (Mediterr.description: A relaxing steamer boat tour that cruises through the canals and waterways connecting park lands.

Fairy Tinker Bell's Busy Buggies.description: A whimsical family track ride in Fantasy Springs where guests board buggies to deliver seasonal supplies to Pixie Hollow.

Flounder's Flying Fish Coaster.description: A gentle junior steel roller coaster themed to Flounder, featuring quick curves and drops over a sandy tide pool.

Indiana Jones Adventure®: Temple of the.description: An intense motion-vehicle dark ride where guests board military transports to escape traps and the Crystal Skull's wrath.

Jasmine's Flying Carpets.description: A spinning family aerial carousel where riders board flying carpets and control their height and tilt over Jasmine's gardens.

Journey to the Center of the Earth.description: A high-speed thrill dark ride using test track slot-car technology to plunge subterranean vehicles down Mount Prometheus.

Jumpin' Jellyfish.description: A gentle vertical parachute drop ride in Triton's Kingdom that lifts and lowers guests inside colorful jellyfish cars.

Nemo & Friends SeaRider.description: A fun motion-simulator ride in Port Discovery that shrinks guests to fish size to explore the ocean with Nemo and Dory.

Peter Pan's Never Land Adventure.description: A groundbreaking 3D motion dark ride in Fantasy Springs where guests fly in pirate boats with Peter Pan to rescue John.

Raging Spirits.description: A compact steel roller coaster in Lost River Delta featuring a 360-degree vertical loop amidst stone ruins and rising steam.

Rapunzel's Lantern Festival.description: A magical romantic water dark ride in Fantasy Springs where guests float past scenes from Tangled, ending with the lantern scene.

Scuttle's Scooters.description: A spinning caterpillars flat ride in Mermaid Lagoon that slides and rotates guests in shells around Scuttle.

Sindbad's Storybook Voyage.description: A charming, musical boat ride in Arabian Coast detailing the journey of Sindbad and Chandu, featuring dozens of animatronics.

Soaring: Fantastic Flight.description: A majestic flight-simulator attraction that lifts guests in hang gliders over panoramic sights and scents of the world.

The Whirlpool.description: A spinning teacup-style flat ride inside Triton's Kingdom where guests spin kelp cup vehicles in a circular motion.

Tower of Terror.description: A high-thrill drop tower ride set inside the cursed Hotel Hightower, featuring a detailed backstory and sudden vertical drops.

Toy Story Mania!.description: An interactive 3D shooting gallery dark ride where guests score points by playing midway carnival games in Andy's room.

Turtle Talk.description: An interactive digital theater show inside the S.S. Columbia where guests can have real-time conversations with Crush the sea turtle.

Venetian Gondolas.description: A relaxing, romantic gondola ride through the canals of Mediterranean Harbor guided by friendly, singing gondoliers.

TRON Lightcycle Power Run – Presented by.description: Climb aboard your own lightcycle and launch into the grid on a high-speed, futuristic steel roller coaster under a massive color-shifting canopy.

Roaring Rapids.description: Plunge down a rushing river on a raft through dark caverns and past the massive, roaring Q'aráq beast in this thrilling Adventure Isle water ride.

Alice in Wonderland Maze.description: Wander through the whimsical hedge maze of the Queen of Hearts, filled with colorful characters, hidden secrets, and interactive displays inspired by Tim Burton's Alice in Wonderland film.

Hunny Pot Spin.description: Spin round and round inside giant hunny pots in a whimsical Hundred Acre Wood setting, controlling the rotation speed of your pot in this family-friendly attraction.

Peter Pan’s Flight.description: Board a magical flying pirate ship and sail over London and Never Land in this classic dark ride featuring Tinker Bell, Peter Pan, Captain Hook, and lost boys.

Seven Dwarfs Mine Train.description: Wind through a glowing diamond mine on a family-friendly roller coaster featuring swinging cars that sway back and forth as you slide down hills.

The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh.description: Board a giant hunny pot and drift through the pages of AA Milne's classic story, joining Pooh and his friends on a windy day in the Hundred Acre Wood.

Voyage to the Crystal Grotto.description: Embark on a peaceful boat ride through Fantasyland, sailing past animated fountains and glowing chambers that bring classic Disney tales to life beneath the castle.

Dumbo the Flying Elephant.description: Take flight aboard the beloved Disney elephant, controlling how high or low your Dumbo flies as you soar above Fantasyland in a classic, family-friendly aerial carousel.

Fantasia Carousel.description: Spin around on a grand carousel featuring symphonic music and beautifully crafted characters and horses inspired by Disney's classic animated film Fantasia.

Explorer Canoes.description: Paddle a canoe along the Rivers of Adventure, taking in scenic views of Treasure Cove and Adventure Isle while working together as a crew under the guidance of a guide.

Pirates of the Caribbean Battle for the.description: Embark on a spectacular high-tech boat ride with Captain Jack Sparrow, featuring massive screens, robotic elements, and dynamic motion to retrieve lost treasure.

Buzz Lightyear Planet Rescue.description: Help Buzz Lightyear save the planet in this interactive shooting ride, aiming laser blasters at targets to defeat the evil Emperor Zurg and his robotic army.

Jet Packs.description: Buckle up and take flight on a futuristic jet pack, controlling your altitude and tilting as you spin rapidly around a glowing, modern centerpiece.

Soaring Over the Horizon.description: Take flight on an IMAX motion simulator that lifts you high into the air, sweeping you over iconic global landmarks like the Great Wall of China and Eiffel Tower.

“Once Upon a Time” Adventure.description: Step through the Magic Mirror on a walk-through adventure inside the castle, following the story of Snow White through interactive projections and displays.

Rex’s Racer.description: Zip back and forth on a U-shaped track in a remote-controlled car piloted by Rex the dinosaur, reaching thrilling heights and speeds in Toy Story Land.

Slinky Dog Spin.description: Climb inside Slinky Dog's coils as he chases his tail around a giant food bowl, spinning round and round in a fun, family-friendly Toy Story attraction.

Zootopia: Hot Pursuit.description: Hop aboard an all-terrain, trackless police vehicle for a wild, high-speed chase through the diverse districts of Zootopia to rescue pop star Gazelle.

Pixar Adventurous Journey.description: Journey through seven immersive worlds celebrating Pixar stories, featuring character sculptures, interactive tech, and beautiful lighting inspired by films like Inside Out, Monsters, Inc., and Coco.

\"it's a small world\".description: Set sail on a gentle, musical boat ride around the globe, listening to a chorus of children sing the classic anthem of peace and friendship in many languages.

Autopia, presented by Avis.description: Board a 1950s-style sports car and drive along a winding scenic track in this retro-futuristic Tomorrowland driving experience.

Big Thunder Mountain.description: Board a runaway mine train for a wild, thrilling coaster ride that plunges under a lake and races through a deserted mining town on an island.

Blanche-Neige et les Sept Nains®.description: Ride in a mine cart through Snow White's story, passing the Seven Dwarfs' cottage and facing the Wicked Queen's tricks in this classic dark ride.

Buzz Lightyear Laser Blast.description: Spin your space cruiser and fire laser blasters at Z's targets to help Buzz Lightyear defeat the evil Emperor Zurg in this interactive shooting ride.

Casey Jr. – le Petit Train du Cirque.description: Board the circus train from Dumbo for a gentle, family-friendly roller coaster ride through miniature scenes of classic Disney fairytale villages.

Disneyland Railroad Discoveryland Statio.description: Board a classic steam-powered train for a scenic grand circle tour around Disneyland Park, departing from the futuristic Discoveryland station.

Disneyland Railroad Fantasyland Station.description: Board a classic steam-powered train for a scenic grand circle tour around Disneyland Park, departing from the fairytale Fantasyland station.

Disneyland Railroad Frontierland Depot.description: Board a classic steam-powered train for a scenic grand circle tour around Disneyland Park, departing from the rustic Frontierland Depot.

Disneyland Railroad Main Street Station.description: Board a classic steam-powered train for a scenic grand circle tour around Disneyland Park, departing from the beautiful, Victorian-style Main Street Station.

Dumbo the Flying Elephant.description: Take flight aboard the beloved Disney elephant, controlling how high or low your Dumbo flies as you soar above Fantasyland in a classic, family-friendly aerial carousel.

Indiana Jones™ and the Temple of Peril.description: Board a runaway mine cart through ancient temple ruins on this thrilling roller coaster, featuring quick twists, drops, and a full 360-degree loop.

La Tanière du Dragon.description: Venture deep beneath Sleeping Beauty Castle to discover a massive, slumbering animatronic dragon that occasionally wakes, snorts smoke, and roars.

Le Carrousel de Lancelot.description: Mount a beautifully decorated, hand-carved wooden horse or sit in a majestic chariot on a classic fairytale carousel spinning to Disney organ music.

Le Pays des Contes de Fées, presented by.description: Set sail on a gentle boat ride showcasing miniature, detailed recreations of settings from classic Disney fairy tales and animated films.

Les Voyages de Pinocchio.description: Travel in a wooden car to follow Pinocchio's quest to become a real boy, encountering Stromboli, Pleasure Island, and Monstro the whale.

Mad Hatter's Tea Cups.description: Spin round and round in a colorful, giant teacup under a beautiful glass canopy, controlling the speed and direction of your spin with a wheel.

Mickey’s PhilharMagic.description: Put on 3D glasses for a spectacular 4D musical show starring Donald Duck as he gets swept into some of Disney's most famous animated musical numbers.

Orbitron®.description: Pilot your own retro-futuristic spaceship inspired by Leonardo da Vinci's drawings, controlling your altitude as you spin high above Tomorrowland.

Peter Pan's Flight.description: Board a magical flying pirate ship and sail over London and Never Land in this classic dark ride featuring Tinker Bell, Peter Pan, Captain Hook, and lost boys.

Phantom Manor.description: Board a slow-moving Doom Buggy for a spooky tour of a derelict, decaying Victorian manor, following the melancholic story of a ghostly bride and her suitors.

Pirate Galleon.description: Explore a realistic, anchored pirate ship to look for hidden passageways, climb the decks, and enjoy scenic views of Adventureland's lagoon.

Pirates of the Caribbean.description: Set sail on a classic dark boat ride through pirate-infested waters, featuring detailed animatronics, battles, drops, and appearances by Jack Sparrow.

Pirates' Beach.description: Let young adventurers run wild in this outdoor pirate-themed play area featuring rope bridges, slides, and paths nestled in the heart of Adventureland.

River Rogue Keelboats.description: Board a rustic wooden keelboat for a peaceful, guided cruise around the waters of Big Thunder Mountain, taking in views of Wilderness Island.

Star Tours: The Adventures Continue*.description: Board a Starspeeder 1000 for a thrilling 3D motion-simulator flight through the Star Wars galaxy, featuring randomized locations and characters.

Star Wars Hyperspace Mountain.description: Launch into space on a thrilling, high-speed indoor roller coaster featuring inversions, laser effects, and a Star Wars soundtrack.

Thunder Mesa Riverboat Landing.description: Board a majestic 19th-century paddle-wheel riverboat for a relaxing, scenic cruise around Frontierland's Rivers of the Far West.
